Container.Name: OpenClaw
Container.Overview:
OpenClaw optimized for Unraid.
Cloudflare Access is the external authentication layer. OpenClaw uses trusted-proxy auth and reads the authenticated user from the Cloudflare Access identity header.
Persistent config stays on /mnt/user/appdata/openclaw/config. Heavy runtime data stays on /mnt/cache/appdata/openclaw to avoid Unraid shfs/FUSE latency for Chromium, browser profile, workspace, Homebrew, and plugin dependency staging.
Secrets are Docker environment variables managed by the Unraid UI. They are not stored in openclaw.json. Blank optional provider variables are unset before OpenClaw starts.
Container.PostArgs: sh -c 'unset OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN; for v in OPENAI_API_KEY TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN ANTHROPIC_API_KEY GEMINI_API_KEY OPENROUTER_API_KEY COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN; do eval "[ -n \"\${$v:-}\" ]" || unset "$v"; done; mkdir -p /root/.openclaw /home/linuxbrew /tmp/openclaw-plugin-stage; exec node dist/index.js gateway --bind lan'

Config.Name: Control UI Port
Config.Description: Port for Control UI and Gateway API.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Small persistent OpenClaw config, credentials, identity, and device state. Keep on /mnt/user for durability.

Config.Name: Browser Runtime Path
Config.Description: Chromium and Playwright runtime. Keep on /mnt/cache/btrfs, not shfs.

Config.Name: Browser Profile Path
Config.Description: Persistent managed browser profile and cookies. Keep on /mnt/cache/btrfs for speed.

Config.Name: Projects Path
Config.Description: Optional coding projects mount. Keep on /mnt/cache/btrfs.

Config.Name: Plugin Stage Path
Config.Description: OpenClaw plugin dependency staging. Keep on /mnt/cache/btrfs to avoid shfs startup stalls.

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: Optional. Used for embeddings/API features. Codex subscription auth is configured separately via openai-codex OAuth.

Config.Name: Telegram Bot Token
Config.Description: Optional Telegram bot token from BotFather.

Config.Name: Gateway Port
Config.Description: Internal gateway port. Keep in sync with Control UI Port.

Config.Name: Plugin Stage Dir
Config.Description: Container path for plugin dependency staging. Must match Plugin Stage Path target.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone for OpenClaw logs. Must be a valid IANA timezone.
